long_description:
[TEL] fluentbit-log-aggregator high cpu usage alert is Triggered

TIP Short Description: fluentbit-log-aggregator cpu usage has been greater than 90% for the past 3 hours
TIP Situation: fluentbit-log-aggregator high cpu usage
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:::mzone2c7:pod:fluentbit-log-aggregator-deploy-6747796d4-m4wzw

Event Generated:

Metric:

Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone2c7' and kube_pod_name = 'fluentbit-log-aggregator-deploy-6747796d4-m4wzw'
